title: DEKTON High Visibility Hi Vis Vest, One Size Hi Viz Vests, Reflective Safety Jacket for Men & Women, Hivisible Workwear, PPE for Cycling, Running & Outdoor Use
features: High Visibility & Reflective Design: The fluorescent material and prominent reflective strips ensure you are easily seen in daylight, at night, and in poor visibility conditions, providing enhanced safety.
Multi-Purpose for All Activities: This versatile vest is ideal for a wide range of uses, from emergencies and outdoor activities to cycling, jogging, or walking your dog.
Secure & Adjustable Fit: The "one size fits all" design with hook and loop fastening allows for a custom and secure fit over any clothing, making it comfortable and reliable for all users.

Essential Safety Equipment: As a crucial piece of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), this vest is designed to keep you safe and visible in environments such as roadways, construction sites, and warehouses.
Durable & Long-Lasting: Constructed from resilient materials, this vest is built for repeated use and designed to be a durable addition to your safety gear.
description: The DEKTON High Visibility Vest is an essential piece of safety equipment designed to keep you safe and seen in any environment. Its fluorescent yellow material and integrated reflective strips work together to provide maximum visibility, whether you are out in bright daylight or navigating low-light conditions. This versatile vest is perfect for a wide range of activities. It is ideal for emergencies, and for outdoor pursuits like cycling, running, and walking your dog. It is also an effective and simple safety solution for professionals working in construction, logistics, and on roadways. Designed with a simple "one size fits all" approach, the vest features a secure hook and loop fastening, allowing you to easily adjust it for a comfortable fit over your regular clothing. It is a durable and reliable tool that ensures you "be safe, be seen" in any situation.
